case_title: AA FIRE SYSTEMS, INC. VS. GAMBURD, INC.

docket_entries.description: FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 10/11/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,293.00 FILED BY AA FIRE SYSTEMS, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT GAMBURD, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-19-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.

SUBMITTED REQUEST FOR DISMISSAL POSTMARKED 2/13/19 AND NOT RECEIVED UNTIL 2/19/19 (2/18/19 WAS A HOLIDAY). DISMISSAL OF ACTION ENTERED BY THE COURT. PLAINTIFF REQUESTED DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE. FILED BY PLAINTIFF AA FIRE SYSTEMS, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT GAMBURD, INC.
